# Credential Schemas

Output files created by each setup script. All stored in `credentials/` and gitignored.

## credentials/{service_id}.json (step 01)

```json
{
  "service": "your-service",
  "service_audience": "your-service",
  "auth": {
    "audience": "LOCAL:<org-uuid>"
  },
  "organization": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "Your Service Name",
    "slug": "your-service"
  },
  "admin": {
    "email": "your-service-admin@yourdomain.com",
    "password": "<auto-generated>",
    "user_id": "uuid",
    "access_token": "eyJ...",
    "refresh_token": "eyJ..."
  },
  "api_key": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "key": "ab0t_sk_live_..."
  },
  "permissions_source": ".permissions.json",
  "created_at": "2026-03-13T10:00:00Z"
}
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `service_audience` | RFC 9068 audience — used by auth for JWT audience claim |
| `auth.audience` | `LOCAL:{org_id}` — legacy format, used by AuthGuard for token validation |
| `organization.id` | Service org UUID — passed as `AB0T_AUTH_ORG_ID` in .env |
| `admin.email` | Admin account for API calls. Default: `{service_id}-admin@{ADMIN_EMAIL_DOMAIN}`. Override via `ADMIN_EMAIL` env var |
| `admin.password` | Admin password — only used for setup scripts, not runtime |
| `api_key.key` | Service API key — used in `AB0T_AUTH_API_KEY` env var |

## credentials/oauth-client.json (step 02)

```json
{
  "client_id": "client_UxYgGTDmyVgBwnyzTDhI1Q",
  "client_name": "Sandbox Platform Frontend",
  "client_type": "public",
  "token_endpoint_auth_method": "none",
  "redirect_uris": [
    "https://sandbox.dev.ab0t.com/auth/callback",
    "http://localhost:3000/auth/callback"
  ],
  "grant_types": ["authorization_code", "refresh_token"],
  "response_types": ["code"],
  "scope": "openid profile email",
  "registration_access_token": "eyJ...",
  "registration_client_uri": "https://auth.service.ab0t.com/auth/oauth/register/uuid",
  "_meta": {
    "org_slug": "sandbox-platform",
    "org_id": "uuid",
    "auth_service_url": "https://auth.service.ab0t.com",
    "registered_at": "2026-03-13T10:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `client_id` | OAuth client ID — used in frontend auth SDK config |
| `registration_access_token` | RFC 7592 token for updating client config later |
| `registration_client_uri` | PUT endpoint for updating client config |

## credentials/hosted-login.json (step 03)

```json
{
  "org_id": "uuid",
  "org_slug": "sandbox-platform",
  "hosted_login_url": "https://auth.service.ab0t.com/login/sandbox-platform",
  "public_config_url": "https://auth.service.ab0t.com/organizations/sandbox-platform/login-config/public",
  "applied_config": { },
  "verification": {
    "hosted_login_page": 200,
    "public_config": 200,
    "auth_providers": 200
  },
  "_meta": { }
}
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `hosted_login_url` | Public login page URL — give to users / link from frontend |
| `verification.*` | HTTP status codes from verification requests — all should be 200 |
| `applied_config.security.accept_invite_*` | If step 03 smart-defaulted `accept_invite_allowed_origins` from `oauth-client.json`, the resolved values land here. Diff this against `config/hosted-login.json` to see what was filled. |

## credentials/end-users-org.json (step 04)

```json
{
  "org_id": "cd790b95-68d7-49ca-beca-ba51a9ea7505",
  "org_slug": "sandbox-platform-users",
  "org_name": "sandbox-platform Users",
  "parent_org_id": "9782399a-fbfe-4981-bead-91b5764c0ded",
  "parent_org_slug": "sandbox-platform",
  "default_role": "member",
  "default_team_id": "7ad37e89-25b9-4e5a-91ce-9d1e0d937ccb",
  "default_team_name": "Default Users",
  "oauth_client_id": "client_UxYgGTDmyVgBwnyzTDhI1Q",
  "hosted_login_url": "https://auth.service.ab0t.com/login/sandbox-platform-users",
  "default_permissions": [
    "sandbox.create.sandboxes",
    "sandbox.read.sandboxes",
    "sandbox.write.sandboxes",
    "sandbox.delete.sandboxes",
    "sandbox.execute.commands",
    "sandbox.read.files",
    "sandbox.write.files",
    "sandbox.read.metrics",
    "sandbox.read.costs"
  ],
  "permission_model": "team-inherited",
  "_meta": {
    "auth_service_url": "https://auth.service.ab0t.com",
    "created_at": "2026-03-13T10:55:08Z",
    "script": "04-setup-default-team.sh",
    "note": "Permissions flow through Zanzibar team membership."
  }
}
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `org_id` | End-users org UUID — the org users register into |
| `org_slug` | End-users org slug — used in hosted login URL and org-scoped auth endpoints |
| `parent_org_id` | Service org UUID — Zanzibar parent relation |
| `default_team_id` | Team UUID — new users auto-join this team |
| `default_permissions` | Permissions inherited through team membership (all `default_grant: true` perms) |
| `oauth_client_id` | OAuth client registered on end-users org |
| `hosted_login_url` | **This is the URL users should use** (not the service org login URL) |

## credentials/{provider}-consumer.json (step 07)

```json
{
  "provider": {
    "service_id": "billing",
    "service_name": "Billing Service",
    "service_url": "http://localhost:8002",
    "root_org_id": "7552d363-..."
  },
  "customer_org": {
    "id": "87225eac-...",
    "name": "Sandbox Platform - Billing Customer",
    "slug": "billing-customer-sandbox-platform",
    "parent_org": "7552d363-..."
  },
  "service_account": {
    "email": "sandbox-platform@billing.customers",
    "user_id": "f31b36cc-..."
  },
  "api_key": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "key": "ab0t_sk_live_...",
    "permissions": ["billing.read", "billing.read.accounts", "billing.cross_tenant"]
  },
  "created_at": "2026-03-13T..."
}
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `api_key.key` | Consumer API key — set as `{PROVIDER}_SERVICE_API_KEY` in .env |
| `customer_org.id` | Sub-org under the provider — the consumer's "account" with the provider |

## Wiring Credentials into Your App

```bash
# From service credentials (step 01)
AB0T_AUTH_ORG_ID=$(jq -r '.organization.id' credentials/sandbox-platform.json)
AB0T_AUTH_API_KEY=$(jq -r '.api_key.key' credentials/sandbox-platform.json)

# From OAuth client (step 02)
OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=$(jq -r '.client_id' credentials/oauth-client.json)

# From end-users org (step 04)
END_USERS_ORG_SLUG=$(jq -r '.org_slug' credentials/end-users-org.json)
END_USERS_LOGIN_URL=$(jq -r '.hosted_login_url' credentials/end-users-org.json)

# From consumer registration (step 07)
BILLING_SERVICE_API_KEY=$(jq -r '.api_key.key' credentials/billing-consumer.json)
```
